loopRule: Measure -> choose earliest unfinished phase -> migrate one byte-identical reader slice -> verify -> remove zero-reader owner -> repeat.

goals.name: Gameplay tuning literals outside generated code are zero
goals.nextFocus: Move remaining champion, item, economy, rune and formula fallback values to canonical ServerPrivate data.

goals.name: Definition queries do not fall back to legacy value owners
goals.nextFocus: Replace legacy fallback with validated coverage and explicit missing-definition failure.

goals.name: Client registration owns no gameplay truth or duplicated visual scalar
goals.nextFocus: Generate SkillDef/Champion visual records and keep registration files limited to hooks.

goals.name: Every implemented champion has ClientPublic model and UI definitions
goals.nextFocus: Extract remaining registration asset paths into ChampionAssetVisualDefs.json.

goals.name: Champion AI profile, skill rule and combo tuning are data-owned
goals.nextFocus: Move ChampionAIPolicy Make*Profile and combo tables into the ServerPrivate pack.

goals.name: Every implemented champion has a generated AI profile
goals.nextFocus: Reject missing champion AI definitions during codegen.

goals.name: Minion behavior, wave formation, structure, jungle and placement tuning are data-owned
goals.nextFocus: Move ServerMinionTuning and wave formation values into SpawnObjectGameplayDefs.

goals.name: Runtime network code reads stable DefinitionKey fields only
goals.nextFocus: Append DefinitionKey fields, migrate writers/readers, then deprecate byte fields.

goals.name: Legacy value owners have zero runtime readers
goals.nextFocus: Delete reader-zero DB, tables, defaults and fallback registries.

goals.name: Every canonical authoring source has a generated JSON Schema
goals.nextFocus: Emit schemas for eight gameplay/AI/rune and three visual sources.

goals.name: Every tunable definition domain supports validated Debug reload
goals.nextFocus: Add server AI/rune and client visual/asset reload without partial publication.

goals.name: Planner draft can be hash-checked, applied and regenerated
goals.nextFocus: Add base-hash guarded apply-draft and round-trip regression fixtures.

completionDefinition: All goals are achieved, all legacy reader counts are zero, and the read-only full verification command passes.
